_: Text annotations for Fantaisie-Impromptu, Op. 66 — all 13 pages. All (x,y) are absolute pixel coordinates in native PDF space (1241×1754) per page. Measured from source PDF via pdftohtml XML extraction at scale 1241/892 (x) and 1754/1262 (y).

enharmonicOverrides._: C# minor Allegro agitato — use enharmonic spellings for raised scale degrees

rules._: MIDI F → E# (leading tone to F#)

enharmonicOverrides._: Db major Largo — use flat spellings, no enharmonic overrides
C# minor recapitulation — same enharmonic spellings as exposition

octaveShifts._: 8va regions — display treble notes one octave lower on staff. Only shifts notes with midi >= midiMin
